# cloudflareext Provider

A minimal Cloudflare provider with write-only attribute support. Manages Cloudflare resources that contain secrets (Hyperdrive, Secrets Store) without persisting sensitive values in Terraform state.

## Example Usage

```terraform
provider "cloudflareext" {
  api_token  = var.cloudflare_api_token
  account_id = var.cloudflare_account_id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `account_id` (String) The Cloudflare account ID. Can also be set via the `CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID` environment variable.
- `api_token` (String, Sensitive) The Cloudflare API token. Can also be set via the `CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN` environment variable.
- `base_url` (String) The base URL for the Cloudflare API. Defaults to `https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4`. Can also be set via the `CLOUDFLARE_API_BASE_URL` environment variable.
